Legs:4.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$500,000 (worldwide box office is 66.9 times production budget)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 26th, 2008 (Wide) by Samuel Goldwyn Films
Video Release: January 27th, 2009 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material and some peril.
Running Time: 122 minutes
Plot point: Addiction, Dysfunctional Family, Relationships Gone Wrong, Religious, Sex Addiction
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Affirm Films, Samuel Goldwyn Films, Sherwood Pictures, Provident Films, Carmel Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
